title: Crash of Silence
writer: Hilda Lewis, Nigel Balchin, Jack Whittingham
actors: Phyllis Calvert, Jack Hawkins, Terence Morgan
plot: Mandy Garland was born deaf and has been mute for all of her life. Her parents believe she is able to speak if she can only be taught, and they enroll her with a special teacher.
awards: Nominated for 6 BAFTA 1 win & 7 nominations total
